title: New behavior for read_verilog handling of whiteboxes

features.name: whitebox attribute on module
features.description: Code should include a module with the (* whitebox *) attribute, which affects how tools like Yosys preserve module contents during blackbox creation

features.name: lib_whitebox attribute on module
features.description: Code should include a module with the (* lib_whitebox *) attribute, a library-specific variant of whitebox that controls preservation during -lib reads

features.name: blackbox attribute on empty module
features.description: Code should include an empty module with the (* blackbox *) attribute, which marks it as having no implementation

features.name: combined whitebox and lib_whitebox attributes with value
features.description: Code should include a module with combined attribute syntax (* whitebox, lib_whitebox = 0 *), demonstrating multi-attribute declaration with values
